mapper.sql: id, protocol_id, http_url, http_method, http_headers, timeout, retry_times, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO mcp_protocol_http ( protocol_id, http_url, http_method, http_headers, timeout, retry_times, status, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
(#{item.protocolId}, #{item.httpUrl}, #{item.httpMethod}, #{item.httpHeaders}, #{item.timeout}, #{item.retryTimes}, #{item.status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT FROM mcp_protocol_http WHERE http_url = #{httpUrl} AND http_method = #{httpMethod} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM mcp_protocol_http WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY id DESC
